calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Vacated

Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement, Attorneys Fees And Costs And Service Award
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS DIEGO GONZALEZ's Motion For Approval Of PAGA Settlement, Attorneys Fees And Costs And Service Award.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for approval of PAGA settlement, attorney's fees and costs and service award" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Motion In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement, Attorneys Fees And Costs And Service Award
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DIEGO GONZALEZ's Motion In Support Of Plaintiff's Motion For Approval Of PAGA Settlement, Attorneys Fees And Costs And Service Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). May be re-set for a Mon.-Thurs. after November 14. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
